entries.name: Access Control
entries.summary: ANPR authorization, vehicle/visitor registry, guard workflow, entry reports.
entries.description: Plate-based entry authorization with a vehicle/visitor-pass/watchlist registry, a guard confirm/reject workflow, and entry/exception/audit reports. Domain-neutral; any gated-entry deployment uses it as-is.

entries.name: Movement Intelligence
entries.summary: Cross-camera ReID candidates, journey trails, and red-zone breach alerts (audited).
entries.description: A privacy-gated correlation layer: multi-signal vehicle ReID anchored on the plate, weak on-demand person-candidate search, and a red-zone breach rule engine. Every identity-like query is audited.

entries.name: Forensic Search
entries.summary: Natural-language + structured query over stored event facts, with a traceable proof layer.
entries.description: Turns accumulated event facts into a queryable memory. The LLM is a query planner, never the source of truth; every answer decomposes into evidence-backed claim levels with confidences.

entries.name: Hello Plugin
entries.summary: A zero-dependency reference sidecar plugin you can copy to build your own.
entries.description: The smallest complete Heldar sidecar: serves a UI, a health endpoint, and a webhook receiver in ~150 lines of standard-library Python. Use it as a template for your own out-of-process plugin.
